/FTRRECORDED/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT ON DA DIVERSION PURS 1001,7/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANTIS ORDERED AND STAYED TO05-02-22/X: BAIL SET AT $5000/CONTD:PROCESS 5K BWSTAY FROM 04-22-22 AT DA DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT 1001,7/DOPC/

/CAL:BAIL REVIEW/X:COUNSEL APPEARED VIA ZOOM,/OR/GTWM/VD:TRIAL ON 02-07-22 AND LAST DAY OF 02-22-22/DEF:TO DO 4 MONTHS DA'S DIVERSION WITH THE FOLLOWING CONDITION: PROOF OF CONTINUOUS 290 REGISTRATION; NO NEW ARRESTS THATLEAD TO CHARGES, NO NEW CONVICTIONS AND 1 N,A, PER WEEK/CONTD:DA'S DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:POSITIVE REPORT/

/CAL:TRIAL AND FURTHER ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/FTRRECORDED/DAWT/ACM/DEF:SHALL REPORT 5 TIMES PER WEEK AND ENTER AND COMPLETE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT ATTRP ACADEMY/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ONPRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH AGPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNEDORDER IN FILE,/LDTR:01-10-22/CONT/DOPU:IN TREATMENT/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/FTRRECORDED/LDTR:01-10-22/X:TRIAL DATE OF 12-29-21 IS CONFIRMED FOR TRIAL AND FURTHER ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN, SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/BWDNC/SAWD/BAIL:10,000/CTORD:ELECTRONIC MONITORING IS REQUIRED IF DEFENDANT POSTS BAIL/X:THE COURT FINDS BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT RELEASING THE DEFENDANT OR LESS RESTRICTIVE ALTERNATIVES TO INCARCERATION WOULD NOT/X:REASONABLY PROTECT THE PUBLIC OR THE VICTIM/X:AND WOULD NOT REASONABLY ASSURETHE DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE AT TRIAL,/X:THE COURT MAKES FURTHER FACTUAL FINDINGS ON THE RECORD,/NTW/LDTR:01-10-22/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIALDIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:PTC & ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENTELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/CONTD:TRIAL/DOP/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & PROOF OF 290 REG (GPS REMOVAL IF REGISTERED)/NP/VD:JURY TRIAL AND LAST DAY/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO12-06-21/X: BAIL SET AT $5000/CONTD:PROCESS 5K BW STAY FROM 11-19-21/DOPC/VD:JURY TRIAL ON 12-06-21 AND LAST DAY/

/CAL:INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/FTRRECORDED/TEXT:DEFT ENTNG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/NTW/LDTR:12-16-21/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:IF 290 REGISTRATION IS PROVIDED AT THE NEXTCALLING OF THE CASE, THE GPSMONITOR MAY BE REMOVED/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & PROOF OF REGISTRATION ON 11-19-21 AND JURY TRIAL ON 12-06-21/DOP/
